---
title: "Mildred Stewart"
---

## Mildred Stewart

**Dates:** (1855/6-1952)

**Maiden name:** (Anderson Morshead)

### Description

sister of Mary Anderson Morshead

### Biography

She married (25 April 1884) Charles William Vanustegen Stewart (b.1859), solicitor, of Plymouth.

### Letters

- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from January 19, 1869

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
